name: hcportal_getNewsflashList
description: Returns all newsflashes, including soft-deleted ones (IsDeleted=1), for the HC Admin Tools management screen. Includes a dismissedCount per newsflash (number of users who clicked 'I've read it'). Ordered by StartDate DESC. Intended for portal admins only — auth gates this to registered portal admin devices.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with NULL callerParamString.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on auth failure or runtime error.

rowsets.name: NewsflashList
rowsets.description: Zero or more rows, one per newsflash, ordered by StartDate DESC. Includes soft-deleted rows (IsDeleted=1).

columns.name: imageUrl
columns.description: Optional Azure Blob URL for the header image

columns.name: startDate
columns.description: Date from which this newsflash is active

columns.name: endDate
columns.description: Optional expiry date (inclusive). NULL = no expiry.

columns.name: kennelId
columns.description: Targeted kennel ID. NULL = platform-wide newsflash.

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: Display name of the targeted kennel. NULL when kennelId is NULL.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: UTC timestamp when the newsflash was created

columns.name: dismissedCount
columns.description: Number of users who have permanently dismissed this newsflash (IsDismissed=1). 0 if no readers yet.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change the ordering (StartDate DESC) without coordinating with the portal client
